arts.ttl: Championship round-up: Sheffield United and Sunderland continue promotion charge as QPR win again
arts.sum: But Matt Bloomfield's Luton remain second bottom after goals from Ciaron Brown and Greg Leigh helped Oxford complete the turnaround. Strikes from Kenneth Paal and Koki Saito put the visitors in the driving seat as Joe Gelhardt's 84th-minute goal for City, his first for the club since joining from Leeds on loan, was not enough to help them mount a fightback.

arts.ttl: Ireland’s Tom Cannon set for €11.8m Sheffield United switch
arts.sum: Ireland striker Tom Cannon is on the verge of completing a €11.8 million move from Leicester City to Sheffield United. Cannon signed for the Foxes for a reported €8.9 million in September 2023 and scored just three times before he was loaned out to Stoke City last August.

arts.ttl: 5 Years of Jack Robinson at Sheffield United
arts.sum: A man of many names. Jacky Long Throw, Captain Jack and most simply, Jack Robinson. Today marks half a decade since the current captain became a Blade. After mass turnover this summer, Robinson has become the longest-serving first-team member of the current Blades squad, a mark of his consistent reliability for United.
